pages.text: The $(9)Gem Case$() is a storage device for $(l:apotheosis:adventure/gems/gems)Gems$().$(p)It can hold up to thirty two thousand gems of each type and purity, and can be upgraded to hold more.

pages.title: Filtering
pages.text: The Gem Case has two filters: a name filter and an item filter.$(p)The name filter allows you to search for a gem by name, while the item filter allows you to search for gems that fit in a specific item.

pages.title: Gem Cutting
pages.text: The Gem Case also has six auxiliary slots that can be used to hold upgrade materials.$(p)If enough materials and gems are present, following the purity upgrade recipes, you can upgrade Gems directly in the case.$(p)This effectively obsoletes the $(l:apotheosis:adventure/gems/gem_cutting)Gem Cutting Table$().

pages.title: A Supreme Gem Case
pages.text: The $(9)Gem Case of House Fabergé$() has a $(6)Storage Capacity$() of two billion.$(p)It cannot be crafted directly, and must be created using $(l:apotheosis:enchanting/table/infusion)Infusion Enchanting$().
